formulas.mean: (value1 + value2 + value3 + value4 + value5 + value6 + value7 + value8) / 8
formulas.median: (sorted => (sorted[3] + sorted[4]) / 2)([value1, value2, value3, value4, value5, value6, value7, value8].sort((a, b) => a - b))
formulas.mode: (arr => { let freq = {}, maxFreq = 0, modes = []; arr.forEach(v => { freq[v] = (freq[v] || 0) + 1; if (freq[v] > maxFreq) maxFreq = freq[v]; }); if (maxFreq === 1) return 'No mode'; for (let k in freq) if (freq[k] === maxFreq) modes.push(k); return 'Mode: ' + modes.join(', '); })([value1, value2, value3, value4, value5, value6, value7, value8])

breakdown: Mean (average) is the sum of all values divided by the count (8).
Median is the middle value: for 8 numbers, it is the average of the 4th and 5th sorted values.
Mode is the most frequently occurring value(s).
